actionable_lessons: Use restart and exchange-state guidance to build bounded retries and safer execution fallback handling.
Treat exchange availability and restart windows as first-class execution risks.
anti_patterns: Matching-engine docs do not remove the need for local audit and reconciliation.
Do not assume retries are always safe without time and price checks.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Use restart and exchange-state guidance to build bounded retries and safer execution fallback handling.
- Treat exchange availability and restart windows as first-class execution risks.

What it does not justify:
- Matching-engine docs do not remove the need for local audit and reconciliation.
- Do not assume retries are always safe without time and price checks.
summary: Official description of matching-engine behavior, including restart-related edge cases.
title: Polymarket Matching Engine
